text.title: vr-design-patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the vr-design-patterns methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scene-comfort-audit
step.action: For each scene, verify ground plane + horizon present.
step.decision-gate: Reject scenes lacking horizon or ground.

step.name: locomotion-policy
step.action: Set teleport-first for novice/general audience. Document smooth + snap-turn options.

step.name: ui-anchoring
step.action: Verify world-anchored / body-anchored. Reject head-locked primary UI.
step.decision-gate: Reject head-locked HUD outside safety telemetry.

step.name: accessibility-fallbacks
step.action: Add seated toggle + one-handed control + subtitles + audio descriptions.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run validate-vr-design-patterns.py. Hardware test with novice users.
